---
name: Feature request
about: Something Reolens should be able to do, but doesn't
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> Before filing: check [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) §1 (platform parity)
> and §5 (no third-party analytics / no remote services). Requests
> that conflict with those principles are unlikely to ship.

## What's the problem?

Describe the situation that prompted the request. *"I want to be able
to glance at one camera while writing email"* lands better than *"add
PiP" — the underlying problem is the more useful framing.

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal Reolens behavior look like? UI sketches welcome.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other apps that solve this; ways you've worked around it without
Reolens; designs that would be simpler but worse.

## Platform scope

- [ ] macOS
- [ ] iPad
- [ ] iPhone

If a feature only makes sense on one platform, say so and why
(`AGENTS.md` §1 — platform parity is the default; carve-outs need
a reason).

## Anything else

Constraints we should know about (e.g. "works offline", "must not
require a Reolink cloud account"), or related Reolink hardware
features the request connects to.
